items.description: Analyzed the current Zeitgeist to formulate thoughtful suggestions for Dior's upcoming collection, covering fashion cycle analysis, market segmentation, and communication strategy.
Conducted an extensive analysis of the employer branding landscape in the tech industry, comparing competitive strategies and identifying best practices.
Formulated a comprehensive set of innovative ideas and suggestions to craft an impactful communication strategy promoting green energy adoption.
Developed a cultural positioning strategy and crafted compelling social media content for a political organization supporting young women.
Performed a comprehensive evaluation of Tod's corporate performance and formulated an astute growth strategy aligned with brand heritage.
Investigated how Italian Generation X engages and interacts with Alexa, using digital ethnographic methods to uncover behavioral patterns.
Designed a co-working space discovery and booking app concept enabling flexible, on-demand workplace access for hybrid workers.
Designed and ran an experiment measuring the impact of decentralized management on productivity and motivation using EEG, ECG, Skin Conductance, and Face Reader tools.
Analyzed how Four Seasons Hotel strategically harnesses organizational culture elements to deliver consistent luxury service at scale.
Designed a strategic plan for Campari Group to amplify employee engagement within a hybrid work setup, focusing on internal communication channels and content.
Developed a comprehensive sustainability project and devised communication strategies aimed at empowering women and advancing gender equality.
Analyzed the September 21, 2021 decree-law on COVID-19 swab cost responsibility from a public affairs perspective, proposing digital advocacy strategies.
